001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller;
002
003import android.os.Bundle;
004import android.view.LayoutInflater;
005import android.view.View;
006import android.view.ViewGroup;
007import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
008import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
009import androidx.fragment.app.Fragment;
010import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelProvider;
011import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint;
012import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.databinding.FragmentEggDetailBinding;
013import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.viewmodel.BatchViewModel;
014
015/**
016 * Fragment intended to display details for a single egg.
017 *
018 * <p>This screen is currently a placeholder for future egg-specific detail
019 * and candling-observation functionality.
020 */
021@AndroidEntryPoint
022public class EggDetailFragment extends Fragment {
023
024  private FragmentEggDetailBinding binding;
025  private BatchViewModel batchViewModel;
026
027  /**
028   * Inflates the egg-detail layout and initializes view binding.
029   *
030   * @param inflater layout inflater.
031   * @param container optional parent container.
032   * @param savedInstanceState saved instance state, if any.
033   * @return root view for this fragment.
034   */
035  @Nullable
036  @Override
037  public View onCreateView(@NonNull LayoutInflater inflater, @Nullable ViewGroup container,
038      @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
039    binding = FragmentEggDetailBinding.inflate(inflater, container, false);
040    return binding.getRoot();
041  }
042
043  /**
044   * Completes fragment setup after the view has been created.
045   *
046   * @param view root view returned from {@link #onCreateView}.
047   * @param savedInstanceState saved instance state, if any.
048   */
049  @Override
050  public void onViewCreated(@NonNull View view, @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
051    super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState);
052
053    batchViewModel = new ViewModelProvider(requireActivity())
054        .get(BatchViewModel.class);
055
056    long eggId = EggDetailFragmentArgs
057        .fromBundle(getArguments())
058        .getEggId();
059
060    if (eggId != 0L) {
061      // TODO add EggRepository/EggViewModel access here:
062      // - load the Egg and its candling observations by eggId,
063      // - observe LiveData and bind to UI.
064    } else {
065      // TODO prepare UI for creating a new egg entry.
066    }
067  }
068
069  /**
070   * Clears the view binding reference when the fragment view is destroyed.
071   */
072  @Override
073  public void onDestroyView() {
074    binding = null;
075    super.onDestroyView();
076  }
077
078}
